title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS Developers presents five techniques to reduce AI hallucinations in agent systems: semantic tool selection to filter context, graph RAG for precise structured queries, multi-agent validation to catch failures, symbolic guardrails implemented in code, and runtime steering for self-correction. The techniques are demonstrated with a travel agent using Strands Agents framework and mapped to Amazon Bedrock AgentCore features.
